name: Priya Kapoor
client_profile: Entrepreneurial HNI with a thematic investing mindset who prefers differentiated idea flow around India capex, PSU reform, and domestic demand rather than a broad market summary.
meeting_context: Follow-up discussion after a thematic portfolio rebalance toward infrastructure and domestic consumption beneficiaries.
primary_objective: Compound returns through high-conviction thematic allocations linked to policy support and domestic growth.
communication_style: Theme-first, insight-led, and impatient with generic macro commentary unless it changes the thesis.
decision_lens: Policy tailwinds, domestic growth durability, and whether sector leadership is broadening or narrowing.
key_concerns: Sustainability of the capex and infra cycle
Whether PSU momentum is still justified
How global risk tone affects domestic thematic leadership
rm_notes: Tracks infrastructure, PSU, and domestic consumption themes closely and expects differentiated talking points rather than a generic market recap. She wants the RM to explain whether global cues change the thesis for her domestic themes.
